AiResponseFormat.description: Use this format to present the user with a short list of text-only options to choose from, such as a menu or a disambiguation prompt. Use it only when there are GREATER THAN 1 and FEWER THAN 8 mutually exclusive choices and none of the choices needs an image.
AiResponseFormat.input: {"type":"object","properties":{"message":{"type":"string","description":"A short prompt that introduces the choices."},"choices":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"},"description":"The selectable text options."}},"required":["message","choices"]}

instructions.instruction: Use TextChoices when offering the user GREATER THAN 1 and FEWER THAN 8 text-only options. Put the introductory sentence in "message" and each option as a string in "choices".
